title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-630)
description: On June 24, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 19.1.1, 19.0.3 and 18.11.6
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 19.1.1, 19.0.3 and 18.11.6
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
